userStory: As a guest user, I want the Home page to display guest-state controls and guest-accessible feature buttons, so that I can use the application before login and open the Login page from the Person/Profile button.
WashTab is a single page application (SPA).
The workflow begins at: http://localhost/washtabui/home The Home page is the shared landing page for both unauthenticated and authenticated users.
This workflow validates only the guest-state behavior of the existing Home page before login.
The guest state is not a separate page from the authenticated Home state.
The application is launched at http://localhost/washtabui/home - The user is unauthenticated and has not signed in - The Home page loads in guest state
Initial Home page load in guest state
Visibility and interactivity of approved guest-state controls
Visibility and interactivity of shared Home shell controls
Navigation from the Person/Profile button to the Login page or Login view

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state from the approved application URL
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state at the approved URL while the user remains unauthenticated and the shared Home page shell is visible.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible and enabled on initial Home page load
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, and actionable in the Home page guest state.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates from Home guest state to the Login page or Login view
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page or Login view while navigation clearly originates from the Home page.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates from Home guest state to the customer-search page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The customer-search page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates from Home guest state to the vehicle-survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The vehicle-survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Site survey button navigates from Home guest state to the survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Home button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Back button remains visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Back button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify Notification button remains visible and enabled in guest state
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The Notification button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening the Login view from the Person/Profile button
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and approved guest-state controls are visible again without authenticating the user.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening the customer-search page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest-state controls visible and the user still unauthenticated.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening the vehicle-survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest-state controls visible and the user still unauthenticated.

approvedScenarios.title: Verify navigation back to Home guest state after opening the survey page
approvedScenarios.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest-state controls visible and the user still unauthenticated.

validations: The Home page loads successfully in guest state at the approved URL while the user remains unauthenticated and the shared Home page shell is visible.
All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, and actionable in the Home page guest state.
The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page or Login view while navigation clearly originates from the Home page.
The customer-search page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The vehicle-survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The Home button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The Back button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The Notification button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The application returns to the Home page guest state and approved guest-state controls are visible again without authenticating the user.
The application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest-state controls visible and the user still unauthenticated.
transitions: The Home page loads successfully in guest state at the approved URL while the user remains unauthenticated and the shared Home page shell is visible.
All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible, enabled, and actionable in the Home page guest state.
The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page or Login view while navigation clearly originates from the Home page.
The customer-search page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The vehicle-survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The survey page opens from the Home page guest state and the user remains unauthenticated throughout the transition.
The Home button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The Back button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The Notification button is displayed in the Home page guest state and is enabled for interaction.
The application returns to the Home page guest state and approved guest-state controls are visible again without authenticating the user.
The application returns to the Home page guest state with approved guest-state controls visible and the user still unauthenticated.

wrapperExpectations: Reuse approved shared/common wrapper keywords before low-level SeleniumLibrary actions.
Do not invent suite-level custom keywords; compose from approved upstream resource knowledge.

mustNotInvent: duplicate ownership for controls already owned in approved upstream resources
hardcoded workflow routing or mapped page logic in Python
downstreamGuidance.generationRule: Downstream generation must consume approved workflow knowledge plus approved resource context before creating new artifacts.
